description: Product Description Women's Opaque Tights Crafted from super soft microfiber yarn, these womens tights are silky soft and stretchy, very comfortable,doesn't rip easily. There are 21 colors for you to choose, the tights are perfect for gymnastics, ballet, costume use, cosplay, formal or casual dress in Spring, Fall, Early Winter and festivals like Halloween Christmas and New Year. 3D spandex knitting technology makes the tights stretchable in all directions and have a better fitting.
